svg.title: EISP Zero Trust Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: High-level Zero Trust architecture showing identity layer, access control, cloud infrastructure, secrets management, and monitoring layers for the Enterprise Identity Security Platform
svg.text: Never trust · Always verify · Assume breach

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about human users in EISP Zero Trust')
sendPrompt('What are service accounts in EISP?')
sendPrompt('What are machine identities in EISP?')
sendPrompt('What is the Kali Linux lab in EISP?')
sendPrompt('Explain SSO in authentik for EISP')
sendPrompt('Explain MFA enforcement in authentik')
sendPrompt('What is SCIM provisioning in EISP?')
sendPrompt('What are authentik flows and policies?')
sendPrompt('Explain AWS IAM roles and RBAC in EISP')
sendPrompt('What are the three IAM roles in EISP?')
sendPrompt('What is Just In Time access in EISP?')
sendPrompt('What is the public subnet in EISP?')
sendPrompt('What lives in the Vault private subnet?')
sendPrompt('What is the SIEM subnet in EISP?')
sendPrompt('Why is the Kali lab subnet isolated?')
sendPrompt('How does HashiCorp Vault work in EISP?')
sendPrompt('What is OpenCTI and how is it used in EISP?')
sendPrompt('How does Wazuh SIEM work in EISP?')
sendPrompt('What is AWS CloudTrail logging in EISP?')
sendPrompt('What are the 6 SIEM detection rules in EISP?')
sendPrompt('How does Terraform work in EISP?')
sendPrompt('What Python automation is in EISP?')
sendPrompt('What offensive security tools are used in EISP?')
